findings.summary: eviction fallback emptied the kept body when the note could not fit even after full eviction — 63 budgets rendered FEWER entries than stock with no note (double loss); fixed by restoring evicted lines, pinned by a tiny-budget band test observed RED against the round-1 code (kept=0 legacy=1 noteless at budget=269)
the new tests never exercised the sub-note-length slack band (how F1 survived RED-first) — band sweep test added over [fixedOnly, fixedOnly+150]

out-of-scope observation: src/export.ts:244 keeps the sibling HTML-comment omission format (appended unconditionally, can overshoot budget) — export-parity follow-up candidate, no consumer of the old render format breaks
